name: White Chocolate Cheesecake with Triple Raspberry
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons slivered almonds - toasted and finely chopped
6 ounces white baking bars, melted, cooled
1 cup fresh raspberries - or frozen loose-pack raspberries
recipeInstructions:
Cheesecake:
1. In a small bowl, combine the cookie crumbs and almonds. Stir in the melted butter. Press onto the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and cooled baking bars with an electric mixer on medium-high speed until combined.
3. Beat in the sugar until the mixture is fluffy. Add the eggs, sour cream, and vanilla extract; beat on low speed until just combined.
4. Pour into the crust. Place on a shallow baking pan. Bake for 45 minutes, or until the center is nearly set when you shake the cheesecake gently.
5. Cool for 15 minutes. Loosen from the sides of the pan. Cool for 30 minutes more; remove the sides of the pan. Cool completely.
6. Cover and chill for at least 4 hours. Cut into wedges and drizzle some of the sauce over each serving.
Triple Raspberry Sauce:
1. In a saucepan, melt the raspberry preserves over low heat. Add the raspberries. Heat gently just until the sauce simmers.
2. Cool. Stir in the liqueur, if desired. Cover and chill until serving time.
